# OpusAIMobility — Safaricom Daraja API

App: OpusAIMobility | Env: Sandbox | Updated: 2026-07-09

## Credentials
- Consumer Key: vIM22PqF28VwSlqpVVDsl6iY7Jx0scfYxS2LuP6PbwGoWd7K
- Consumer Secret: gZX7LcSxyXTHbL5GXq4qy0pZKHvaSJ4BumGMAMYLnlem2bra8vo4agvq5xuiYvE5
- Basic Auth Header: dklNMjJQcUYyOFZ3U2xxcFZWRHNsNmlZN0p4MHNjZll4UzJMdVA2UGJ3R29XZDdLOmdaWDdMY1N4eVhUSGJMNUdYcTRxeTBwWktIdmFTSjRCdW1HTUFNWUxubGVtMmJyYTh2bzRhZ3ZxNXh1aVl2RTU=
- Passkey: bfb279f9aa9bdbcf158e97dd71a467cd2e0c893059b10f78e6b72ada1ed2c919
- ShortCode: 174379
- Test Phone: 254708374149
- Initiator: testapi / Safaricom123!!
- PartyA: 600977 | PartyB: 600000

## Workflow
1. Run "Generate OAuth Access Token" → copy token into {{access_token}}
2. Run "Initiate STK Push" → phone 254708374149 gets M-Pesa prompt
3. Daraja POSTs result to: https://0wv2nyk3je.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod/payments/mpesa/callback
